title: ADDPREFIXMAPPING
text: ADDPREFIXMAPPING Adds a namespace to the beginning of an element tag. ADDPREFIXMAPPING (Prefix,URI Copy Parameters Table 1. ADDPREFIXMAPPING parameters Parameter Data Type Direction Description Prefix String IN Namespace identifier prefixed to element name; maximum length is 40 bytes. URI String IN URL or other URI for the namespace; maximum length is 512 bytes. Description Call the ADDPREFIXMAPPING operation after calling the STARTELEMENT operation or another ADDPREFIXMAPPING operation. The prefix defined with it does not have to be the same one used in the STARTELEMENT invocation. Thus, if the STARTELEMENT itself added a namespace specification, then ADDPREFIXMAPPING will add a second (or third or fourth …) to the tag. Explain this code variables handle writer endvariables newinstance "UXMLWRITER", writer writer->startdocument(...) ... writer->startelement("p", "tag", "http://a/a/a") ; result: <p:tag writer->addprefixmapping("s", "http://b/c/e") ; result: <p:tag writer->addprefixmapping("", "http://a/b/default") ; result: <p:tag xmlns="http://a/b/default" ... Copy Related Links STARTELEMENT Operation activated by the SAX parser when a start tag is encountered. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
